summary: A scorching late‑80s show highlighted by a blistering first set and an all‑awesome China>Rider>Saturday Night encore; recording quality is unremarked but presumed solid.
review: The concert is praised as an “absolute scorcher” with high energy in the first set, standout performances of Good Times Roll, Ramblin’ Rose and Let It Grow, and a flawless second‑set finale featuring China into Rider and Saturday Night. The reviewer notes a few timing slips on Stranger and Row Jimmy but overall rates the show highly (4 stars). No specific recording issues are mentioned, suggesting an acceptable sound source.

ai_rating.rationale: Strong musical performance with several standout moments outweighs minor sloppy songs; lack of recording comments prevents a higher confidence rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on soundboard, audience mix, clarity or other technical aspects.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set praised for its energy despite a few timing hiccups; second set described as great from start to finish, ending with an especially strong China>Rider>Saturday Night sequence.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Belts out a killer Ramblin' Rose, noted as a highlight.
